description: Base Python rules derived from PEP 8, python_rules.md, and common_rules.md

rules.name: no_wildcard_imports
rules.description: Wildcard imports (from module import *) pollute the namespace
rules.message: Wildcard import detected. Import only the names you need explicitly.
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace 'from module import *' with explicit imports.

rules.name: no_bare_except
rules.description: Bare except clauses catch system exits and keyboard interrupts — use specific exceptions
rules.message: Bare 'except:' clause detected. Always catch specific exception types.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use 'except Exception as e:' or a more specific exception class.

rules.name: no_print_statements
rules.description: print() calls should be replaced with structured logging in backend/library code
rules.message: print() found. Use the 'logging' module for backend code (logger.info, logger.debug, etc.).
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace print() with logging.getLogger(__name__).info(...) or appropriate log level.

rules.name: no_eval_exec
rules.description: eval() and exec() are dangerous with untrusted input
rules.message: eval()/exec() detected — security risk. Never use with untrusted input.
rules.fix_suggestion: Refactor to avoid dynamic code execution, or use ast.literal_eval() for safe expression parsing.

rules.name: type_hints_required
rules.description: Public functions should have type hints on all parameters and the return value
rules.message: Public function is missing type annotations. Add type hints for parameters and return type.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add type hints: def func(name: str) -> None:

rules.name: snake_case_function_names
rules.description: Function names should be snake_case per PEP 8
rules.message: Function name violates snake_case convention (PEP 8).
rules.fix_suggestion: Rename the function to snake_case (e.g., myFunction → my_function).

rules.name: no_unused_imports
rules.description: Unused imports add noise and increase load time
rules.message: Unused import detected. Remove it to keep the module clean.
rules.fix_suggestion: Delete the import line or use it, or suppress with # noqa: F401 if intentional.

rules.name: max_line_length_79
rules.description: Lines exceeding 79 characters violate PEP 8
rules.message: Line exceeds 79 characters (PEP 8 limit). Consider breaking it up.
rules.fix_suggestion: Wrap the line using parentheses or backslash continuation. Tools: black --line-length 79
rules.comment: Disabled by default — many teams use 88 or 120. Enable in config to enforce.

rules.name: no_hardcoded_secrets_python
rules.description: Python-specific hardcoded secret patterns
rules.message: Hardcoded secret or credential detected in Python code.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use os.getenv('KEY') or python-decouple. Never commit actual values.

rules.name: import_order
rules.description: Imports should be ordered: stdlib → third-party → local (PEP 8)
rules.message: Check import order: stdlib → third-party → local (alphabetical within groups).
rules.fix_suggestion: Use isort or ruff to auto-sort imports.
rules.comment: Informational only — too complex for regex. Use isort/ruff in CI instead.

rules.name: no_mutable_default_args
rules.description: Mutable default arguments (list, dict, set) are shared across calls — a common Python bug
rules.message: Mutable default argument detected. Use None and create inside the function body.
rules.fix_suggestion: Change def f(items=[]) to def f(items=None): items = items or []

rules.name: cognitive_complexity
rules.description: Function cognitive complexity exceeds threshold (SonarQube-style)
rules.message: Function has high cognitive complexity. Refactor to reduce nesting and branches.
rules.fix_suggestion: Extract nested logic into helper functions. Use early returns to reduce nesting.

rules.name: too_many_parameters
rules.description: Functions with too many parameters are hard to understand and maintain
rules.message: Function has too many parameters. Group into a dataclass or config object.
rules.fix_suggestion: Create a dataclass/NamedTuple for related params: @dataclass class Config: ...

rules.name: no_shell_injection
rules.description: subprocess with shell=True is a command injection risk
rules.message: subprocess called with shell=True — command injection risk.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use a list of args: subprocess.run(['cmd', 'arg1']) instead of shell=True.

rules.name: no_unsafe_deserialization
rules.description: pickle.loads, yaml.load without SafeLoader, and marshal.loads can execute arbitrary code
rules.message: Unsafe deserialization detected. Use safe alternatives.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use json.loads() instead of pickle. Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load().

rules.name: no_empty_except_body
rules.description: Except blocks with only 'pass' silently swallow errors — at minimum log them
rules.message: Empty except body silently swallows errors. At minimum, log the exception.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add logging.exception('...') or re-raise with 'raise' to surface the error.

rules.name: no_unreachable_code
rules.description: Code after return/raise/break/continue is unreachable dead code
rules.message: Unreachable code detected. Remove dead statements after return/raise.
rules.fix_suggestion: Delete the unreachable lines or restructure the control flow.

rules.name: no_is_literal_comparison
rules.description: Using 'is' with a string/int literal is a bug — use '==' for value comparison
rules.message: Do not use 'is' with a literal. Use '==' for value comparison.
rules.fix_suggestion: Replace 'x is 1' with 'x == 1'. 'is' checks identity, '==' checks equality.

rules.name: no_unused_variables
rules.description: Variables assigned but never read are dead code
rules.message: Unused variable detected. Remove it or prefix with '_'.
rules.fix_suggestion: Delete the assignment or prefix with underscore: _unused = ...

rules.name: no_fstring_without_placeholder
rules.description: f-strings without any {placeholder} are wasteful and likely a mistake
rules.message: f-string has no placeholders. Use a regular string instead.
rules.fix_suggestion: Remove the f prefix: f'hello' → 'hello', or add a placeholder: f'hello {name}'.

rules.name: no_empty_function_body
rules.description: Functions with only pass or ... as body are dead code (unless abstract)
rules.message: Function has an empty body. Implement it or remove it.
rules.fix_suggestion: Add the implementation or delete the function. Use @abstractmethod for interfaces.

rules.name: duplicate_string_literals_py
rules.description: String literals repeated 3+ times in one file should be extracted to a constant
rules.message: Duplicated string literal found. Extract to a module-level constant.
rules.fix_suggestion: Define MY_CONST = 'value' at module level and reference it everywhere.

rules.name: cyclomatic_complexity
rules.description: McCabe cyclomatic complexity exceeds threshold — too many branches
rules.message: Function has high cyclomatic complexity. Reduce branches and decision points.
rules.fix_suggestion: Extract conditions into helper functions. Use early returns. Simplify boolean expressions.
